description: Complete psionic rules for the Psionicist class, including all 6 disciplines, psionic sciences and devotions, PSP costs, and psionic combat

psionic_overview.description: Psionics is the ability to affect the world through the power of the mind alone. Unlike wizards who channel magical energy or priests who call on divine power, psionicists use pure mental force.
psionic_overview.psionic_potential: Any character can potentially manifest psionic powers. Roll 1d20 per ability score; if any score generates a 1, the character has wild psionic talent.

wild_talent_table.description: Random wild talents gained by non-psionicist characters
wild_talent_table.chance: 1% per point of INT + WIS + CHA (divided by 3) check; typically very rare
wild_talent_table.effect: If roll succeeds, gain one random psionic power with limited PSP pool

psionic_strength_points.description: The fuel for psionic powers. Each power costs PSPs to activate and maintain.

starting_psps.calculation: (INT + WIS + CON) divided by 3, then add level bonus

psionic_strength_points.recovery: PSPs recover at 1 per hour of rest or meditation; full recovery after 8 hours rest

power_score.description: Each psionic power has a Power Score, which determines success probability
power_score.calculation: Power Score = relevant ability score (usually INT or WIS) - penalty for power level
power_score.success: Roll 1d20 against or under Power Score
power_score.power_score_result: Rolling exactly the Power Score activates the power at maximum effectiveness
power_score.success_check: Roll under or equal to Power Score = success; higher roll = failure
power_score.failure_result: Failed check still costs minimum PSP cost; power simply doesn't activate
power_score.20_result: Rolling 20 always fails and may cause additional side effects or backlash

psionic_combat.description: Psionic combat occurs on a separate mental battlefield simultaneous with physical combat

attack_modes.name: Psionic Blast
attack_modes.description: Broad-area attack that assaults all minds within range; 5d4 damage to everyone in 20-ft area; no attack roll needed; save vs. spell for half

attack_modes.name: Mind Thrust
attack_modes.description: Focused attack on one target; precise mental dagger; deals 1d10 damage if successful

attack_modes.name: Ego Whip
attack_modes.description: Attacks opponent's ego and self-identity; target must save or be confused 1d4 rounds (-4 to all actions)

attack_modes.name: Id Insinuation
attack_modes.description: Manipulates the deep subconscious; on success, target acts on primitive urges for 1d4 rounds (uncontrolled aggression)

attack_modes.name: Psychic Crush
attack_modes.description: Attempts to overwhelm all psionic activity; target stunned for 1d6 rounds if failed save (no actions possible)

defense_modes.name: Mind Blank
defense_modes.description: Empties the mind; reduces all psionic attack damage by 50%; no offensive capability while using

defense_modes.name: Thought Shield
defense_modes.description: Projects mental armor; reduces attack impact; -4 to damage from psionic attacks

defense_modes.name: Mental Barrier
defense_modes.description: Builds a wall of mental force; reduces attacks to minimum damage and slows psionic activity of attacker

defense_modes.name: Intellect Fortress
defense_modes.description: Creates a mental fortress; the best defensive mode; psionic attack against it only deal 1 HP per die

defense_modes.name: Tower of Iron Will
defense_modes.description: Absolute maximum defense; immune to all psionic attacks but cannot use any other psionic powers while maintaining it

combat_matrix.description: Attacks vs. defenses table — X means defender takes full damage; partial means reduced damage; N means no effect

clairsentience.description: Powers of sensing, perceiving, and gaining knowledge beyond normal means. Associated ability: WIS

sciences.name: Clairvoyance
sciences.description: See any location you can visualize. Functions like Wizard Eye. Can observe without being detected.

sciences.name: Clairaudience
sciences.description: Hear at any location as if physically present. Can monitor conversations.

sciences.name: Object Reading
sciences.description: Read the history of an object: its most recent owner, significant events associated with it, emotional impressions. More time invested reveals older history.

sciences.name: Precognition
sciences.description: Gain vague visions of possible future events. Not infallible — future is mutable. DM provides cryptic hints about likely outcomes.

sciences.name: Sensitivity to Psychic Impressions
sciences.description: Sense emotional residue left by past events in a location. The stronger the event, the clearer the impression. Can detect scenes up to centuries old.

devotions.name: Combat Mind
devotions.description: Enhances combat awareness. +2 to initiative, +1 to AC, +1 to saves from anticipating attacks.

devotions.name: Danger Sense
devotions.description: Sense danger before it materializes. Cannot be surprised. +2 to saves vs. traps and ambushes.

devotions.name: Detection of Magic
devotions.description: Detects magical auras within 40 ft. Can identify spell school with successful power score roll.

devotions.name: Empathy
devotions.description: Sense emotional state of a target: anger, fear, joy, hostility, etc. Does not read thoughts.

devotions.name: Feel Light
devotions.description: Perceive photonic energy directly; effectively provides a form of vision in complete darkness, sensing light as a tactile sensation.

devotions.name: Feel Sound
devotions.description: Sense sound vibrations directly. Can 'hear' while deaf, detect sounds too high or low in frequency for normal hearing.

devotions.name: Hear Light
devotions.description: Translates light wave information into sound impressions. See with sound, effectively a form of echolocation for visible spectrum.

devotions.name: Know Direction
devotions.description: Always know which direction is north, as well as orientation relative to any location previously visited.

devotions.name: Know Location
devotions.description: Know exactly where you are: current plane, country, region, and general geographic position.

devotions.name: Poison Sense
devotions.description: Detect poisonous substances within range. Knows if food/drink is poisoned, how potent, and general type.

devotions.name: Radial Navigation
devotions.description: Sense the complete three-dimensional environment within range. Functions as perfect spatial awareness.

devotions.name: Recall
devotions.description: Perfectly recall any memory from the last month. On power score, can recall memories years old. Eidetic recall within limits.

devotions.name: See Magic
devotions.description: Directly perceive magical auras as visible light. Different spell schools appear as different colors.

devotions.name: Spirit Sense
devotions.description: Detect undead and astral/ethereal beings within range, including invisible ones.

psychokinesis.description: Powers to move and manipulate matter and energy with the mind. Associated ability: CON

sciences.name: Detonate
sciences.description: Causes a non-magical object to explode. Object up to 10 lbs is destroyed; all within 10 ft take 5d6 damage (save vs. breath weapon for half). Larger objects: partial damage only.

sciences.name: Disintegrate
sciences.description: Destroys one non-living object or creature (save vs. spell negates for creatures). Object up to 10 cu ft is vaporized. Legendary power. Creatures who fail save are destroyed (no save for objects).

sciences.name: Molecular Rearrangement
sciences.description: Rearrange molecular structure of matter to change its properties. Turn wood to stone, lead to iron, etc. Cannot create new materials, only change existing ones.

sciences.name: Project Force
sciences.description: Fires a bolt of pure kinetic force; deals 3d4 damage to one target. No saving throw.

sciences.name: Telekinesis
sciences.description: Move objects with the mind. Initial lift: 25 lbs; each additional 10 lbs costs +1 PSP/round. Speed: 20 ft/round. Can be used offensively (+2 attack as hurled missile).

devotions.name: Control Body
devotions.description: Take control of another's physical body. Target takes -4 to all actions; can be forced to attack allies, drop weapons, or remain still. Save vs. spell negates.

devotions.name: Control Flames
devotions.description: Control existing fire; expand, contract, extinguish, or redirect existing flames. Cannot create fire.

devotions.name: Control Light
devotions.description: Manipulate existing light sources; create temporary illumination or darkness. Effectively bends light rays.

devotions.name: Control Sound
devotions.description: Amplify, reduce, or redirect sounds. Can create sound from nothing or silence an area.

devotions.name: Control Wind
devotions.description: Create or redirect wind currents of up to 30 mph. Useful for sailing, blowing away gases, or unbalancing opponents (STR check at -4 to avoid falling).

devotions.name: Create Sound
devotions.description: Create any sound at any location within range, including voices, footsteps, animal sounds, etc.

devotions.name: Inertial Barrier
devotions.description: Creates a barrier that slows incoming objects. All physical ranged attacks suffer -2 to hit and -1 per die of damage.

devotions.name: Levitation
devotions.description: Lift self or one willing creature vertically. Rise or lower 5 ft per segment (50 ft/round). Cannot move horizontally (wind or other movement required for that).

devotions.name: Molecular Agitation
devotions.description: Increase molecular vibration of a target; causes 1d4 heat damage per round and may ignite combustibles after 3 rounds.

devotions.name: Molecular Manipulation
devotions.description: Weaken material at a point; reduce HP of an object by 1d8 per round; eventually causes object to break or fall apart.

psychometabolism.description: Powers to control and alter biological systems, including one's own body. Associated ability: CON

sciences.name: Complete Healing
sciences.description: Fully heals all HP damage, cures diseases, neutralizes poisons, and regrows lost limbs over 24 hours. Single use per day.

sciences.name: Death Field
sciences.description: Draws life energy from all nearby creatures. All within radius take 2d8 damage and user regains that many HP. Undead are immune. Evil power.

sciences.name: Energy Containment
sciences.description: Absorb and contain one energy type (fire, cold, electricity, acid, etc.). Store up to 4d6 damage worth of energy. Release stored energy as a bolt (expend all stored energy in one bolt).

sciences.name: Life Draining
sciences.description: Drain life from a victim on successful touch attack. Victim loses 1d4+1 levels permanently; each level drained restores 1d4+1 HP to user. Only works on living creatures. Extremely evil power.

sciences.name: Metamorphosis
sciences.description: Transform into any living creature of similar size. Gain all physical abilities but not special powers. Duration: maintained by PSPs. One transformation per day.

devotions.name: Accelerate Healing
devotions.description: Triple natural healing rate. Recover 3 HP per rest period instead of 1.

devotions.name: Adrenalin Control
devotions.description: Flood body with adrenalin. +2 STR, +2 CON, +1 attack per round. Afterward: -2 to all ability scores for 1d4 hours.

devotions.name: Animal Affinity
devotions.description: Take on characteristics of a chosen animal type. Gain one animal sense or movement mode (e.g., scent like wolf, speed like horse, climbing like cat).

devotions.name: Biofeedback
devotions.description: Control body's metabolic responses. Can slow heartbeat to appear dead (only +5 CON save detects life); resist torture; extend breath-holding time.

devotions.name: Body Equilibrium
devotions.description: Control body weight and balance. Walk on water, thin ice, or unstable surfaces. Fall without taking damage. +4 to all Dexterity-based checks.

devotions.name: Body Weaponry
devotions.description: Form natural weapons: claws (1d4+2), fangs (1d4+1), bone spurs (1d6). These count as +1 magical weapons for damage purposes.

devotions.name: Cell Adjustment
devotions.description: Heal own wounds at 1d8 HP per round while active. Also cures disease and neutralizes poison over time.

devotions.name: Chemical Simulation
devotions.description: Generate chemical substances using body: acid (1d6+4 damage), antitoxin (neutralize poison), or temporary adhesive.

devotions.name: Displacement
devotions.description: Appear displaced 2 ft from actual location; first attack per round automatically misses; +2 to all saves.

devotions.name: Enhanced Strength
devotions.description: Enhance muscular strength. +1d4 STR for the duration. Each +1 costs 2 additional PSP/round above the base.

devotions.name: Expansion
devotions.description: Increase body size up to double. +4 STR, +4 CON, -2 DEX, -2 to hit with weapons (reach issues). AC worsens by 1.

devotions.name: Feel Pain
devotions.description: Inflict phantom pain on a target. No damage but -2 to all actions for duration. Save vs. spell to resist.

devotions.name: Graft Weapon
devotions.description: Temporarily attach a weapon to one's hand, fusing it with the body. Cannot be disarmed. +2 to hit with that weapon. Cannot use that hand for anything else.

devotions.name: Hibernate
devotions.description: Enter a state of hibernation. No food or water needed; age only 1 day per year in hibernation. Awareness is dim; can set a condition to awaken.

devotions.name: Immovability
devotions.description: Root yourself to the spot with incredible solidity. Cannot be moved by any physical means. Anchored to ground. -4 to attacks and AC but immune to knockdown, bull rush, etc.

devotions.name: Mind Over Body
devotions.description: Ignore the effects of wounds for a short time. Can act normally even with 0 or negative HP for 1 round per level before dropping unconscious.

devotions.name: Share Strength
devotions.description: Transfer physical strength to another. Temporarily lose 1d4+1 STR; target gains equivalent STR. Both effects last 1 hour.

devotions.name: Shrink
devotions.description: Reduce body size to half. -4 STR, -4 CON, +4 DEX. Gain +4 to AC due to size. Can fit through tiny spaces.

devotions.name: Skin of Steel
devotions.description: Harden skin to an iron-like consistency. Reduces all physical damage by 1 per die (minimum 1 per die). AC improves by 2.

devotions.name: Suspend Animation
devotions.description: Enter complete suspended animation. No biological processes. Can survive any environment. Set a condition for automatic waking.

psychoportation.description: Powers to move through space and across planes. Associated ability: STR/CON

sciences.name: Banishment
sciences.description: Force an extraplanar being back to its home plane. Save vs. spell at -4. Banished being cannot return for 1 day per caster level.

sciences.name: Probability Travel
sciences.description: Travel to parallel realities (alternate timelines). Can visit probable futures or alternate pasts. Cannot change own timeline. Must return to original within 1 hour per level.

sciences.name: Summon Planar Creature
sciences.description: Summon one creature from another plane. Creature has up to 2 HD per level of caster. No guarantee of obedience; creature may attack if not properly persuaded.

sciences.name: Teleport
sciences.description: Teleport self and up to 200 lbs of carried equipment to any location on same plane. Accuracy: familiar location (well-known) = accurate; seen (once) = near; unfamiliar (description only) = possibly random offset.

sciences.name: Teleport Other
sciences.description: Teleport another creature to a desired location. Target must be willing or save vs. spell. Same accuracy table as Teleport.

devotions.name: Astral Projection
devotions.description: Project consciousness into the Astral Plane while body remains behind. Astral form can observe but not physically affect the world. Tied to body by silver cord; cord cut = death.

devotions.name: Blink
devotions.description: Randomly blink in and out of the ethereal plane. All attacks have 20% miss chance. +4 to AC. Random direction each round.

devotions.name: Dimensional Door
devotions.description: Open a dimensional portal to any location within range seen or well known. One creature at a time; portal lasts 1 round.

devotions.name: Dimension Walk
devotions.description: Walk the dimensions between planes. Travel through a limited Ethereal state. Move at half speed but pass through physical barriers.

devotions.name: Etherealness
devotions.description: Enter the Ethereal Plane. Invisible and intangible to material world. Can move through solid matter. Cannot affect material world (except with some powers).

devotions.name: Phase Door
devotions.description: Pass through a solid wall of up to 8 ft thick. No sound, no trace. Can bring one additional creature per 5 levels.

devotions.name: Teleport Trigger
devotions.description: Set a conditional teleport. If a specified triggering event occurs (taking X damage, hearing a word, etc.), immediately teleport to a preset location. One trigger at a time.

telepathy.description: Powers to communicate with, sense, and control other minds. Associated ability: CHA/INT

sciences.name: Domination
sciences.description: Complete mental domination of one creature. Target must obey all commands. Save vs. spell at -2 negates. Dominated creature performs any action but retains some ability to sabotage orders.

sciences.name: Fate Link
sciences.description: Link one's fate to another's. When linked target suffers damage, user takes half; user also takes half. Lasts 1 day per level. Cannot be ended by either party until duration expires.

sciences.name: Mass Domination
sciences.description: Dominate multiple targets simultaneously. Can control up to 2 HD per level. All targets save independently.

sciences.name: Mindlink
sciences.description: Create a telepathic link with willing or unwilling target. Share thoughts, sensations, and emotions. Unwilling target gets save vs. spell.

sciences.name: Psychic Surgery
sciences.description: Repair mental damage: cure insanity, remove magical compulsions or charms, repair personality damage from trauma, modify memories (with ethical implications).

devotions.name: Attraction
devotions.description: Make a target feel positive feelings toward the psionicist. Similar to a very gentle Charm; target is friendly, not dominated. Save vs. spell negates.

devotions.name: Awe
devotions.description: Inspire feelings of awe and reverence. All within range treat psionicist as an authority figure for duration. -2 to saves vs. commands while in awe.

devotions.name: Conceal Thoughts
devotions.description: Block mind-reading attempts. Immune to telepathy, ESP, and similar powers. Can also project false surface thoughts.

devotions.name: Contact
devotions.description: Establish contact with a known, specific individual anywhere on the same plane. Both parties must be willing for a conversation.

devotions.name: Daydream
devotions.description: Distract a target with vivid daydreams. Target must save vs. spell or be distracted (-4 to all actions) for the duration.

devotions.name: Ego Boost
devotions.description: Boost one's own mental strength. +4 to saves vs. mental attacks; +2 to power scores for psionic combat defenses.

devotions.name: Empathy
devotions.description: Sense the basic emotional state of a target (see Clairsentience devotion Empathy; accessible from both disciplines).

devotions.name: False Sensory Input
devotions.description: Feed false sensory impressions to a target. They see, hear, feel, smell, or taste what the psionicist projects. Save vs. spell negates.

devotions.name: Identity Penetration
devotions.description: Penetrate mental defenses and disguises. Detect true identity even through shapeshifting or magical disguise. Detect alignment.

devotions.name: Inflict Pain
devotions.description: Inflict mental pain on a target. -4 to all actions; no damage. Save vs. spell to resist entirely.

devotions.name: Invisibility
devotions.description: Project mental suggestion that prevents others from noticing the psionicist. Functions as Invisibility spell but works through telepathy rather than light-bending.

devotions.name: Irrationality
devotions.description: Scramble a target's logical reasoning. They must roll twice for any decision or action and take the worse result. Save vs. spell negates.

devotions.name: Life Detection
devotions.description: Detect all living minds within range. Sense their direction and approximate power level. Undead do not register; constructs do not register.

devotions.name: Mental Domination
devotions.description: Limited version of Domination science. Control one target for duration. Save vs. spell negates. Target remembers nothing while dominated.

devotions.name: Mind Bar
devotions.description: Resistance to psionic intrusion. +4 to saves vs. all telepathy powers. Immune to Contact without permission.

devotions.name: Psionic Blast
devotions.description: See Psionic Combat attack modes. Also available as a devotion for emergency offensive use.

devotions.name: Repugnance
devotions.description: Inspire feelings of repugnance and disgust. Target avoids the psionicist and all suggested subjects.

devotions.name: Send Thoughts
devotions.description: Send one-way thoughts or messages to a target. Target hears the thoughts as if spoken. No response possible without Contact.

devotions.name: Sight Link
devotions.description: Share visual perspective with a willing target. See through their eyes; they can see through yours if they choose.

devotions.name: Soul Expulsion
devotions.description: Rip the soul from a living body. Target save vs. death magic at -4 or have soul expelled to Astral Plane. Body remains alive but comatose. The expelled soul can be recovered.

devotions.name: Synaptic Static
devotions.description: Flood area with mental static. All psionic users in area lose 1d4 PSPs per round. Non-psionicists are unaffected.

devotions.name: Taste Link
devotions.description: Share taste sensations with a willing target.

devotions.name: Telempathic Projection
devotions.description: Project strong emotions to a target. Can inspire fear, courage, rage, sadness, or euphoria. Target may save vs. spell.

metapsionics.description: Powers that affect psionics itself. Can be learned only after mastering other disciplines. Associated ability: WIS
metapsionics.prerequisite: Must know powers from at least 3 other disciplines

sciences.name: Appraise
sciences.description: Precisely assess the psionic powers and abilities of any creature within range. Learn exact disciplines, powers, and remaining PSPs.

sciences.name: Aura Sight
sciences.description: Read the complete psionic aura of any being. Reveals all psionic capabilities, current PSPs, and psionic activity in use.

sciences.name: Empower
sciences.description: Temporarily boost the power score of another psionicist. Target gains +4 to power score for one power; user pays double PSP cost.

sciences.name: Psychic Clone
sciences.description: Create a duplicate of the psionicist's mind that can use psionic powers independently. The clone exists as a semi-independent entity.

sciences.name: Ultrablast
sciences.description: The ultimate psionic offensive power. All in range take 10d10 mental damage (save vs. spell for half). Psionicists also lose all PSPs and cannot use powers for 1 hour.

devotions.name: Cannibalize
devotions.description: Convert HP to PSPs at a ratio of 2:1. Deals 1 HP per 0.5 PSPs gained. Maximum 10 HP per use. Cannot reduce below 1 HP.

devotions.name: Convergence
devotions.description: Pool PSPs between willing psionicists. All can draw from the shared pool. Split evenly at end of duration.

devotions.name: Gird
devotions.description: Strengthen psionic defenses. +4 to all psionic defense mode effectiveness. Psionic combat attacks cost opponents 1 extra PSP per round against you.

devotions.name: Magnify
devotions.description: Double the range or area of a chosen power. Costs double PSPs for that power use.

devotions.name: Martial Trance
devotions.description: Achieve perfect psionic focus in combat. All power scores are at +2; psionic combat defenses cost 1 less PSP per round.

devotions.name: Prolong
devotions.description: Double the duration of a chosen maintained power. Costs double maintenance PSPs.

devotions.name: Psychic Drain
devotions.description: Drain PSPs from a target psionicist at 3 PSPs per round. Drained PSPs are lost, not transferred.

devotions.name: Retrospection
devotions.description: Access memories of psionic activities. Review any psionic power use within the last day in perfect detail.

devotions.name: Wrench
devotions.description: Disrupt a maintained psionic power. Targeted power is ended immediately; power user pays activation cost again to restart. Save vs. spell negates.

psychic_encounters.description: Psionic creatures and their psionic capabilities

creatures_with_psionics.powers: Mind Blast (cone, save or stun), ESP, Levitation, Domination, Charm Monster
creatures_with_psionics.notes: Powerful psionic hunters who eat brains; immune to psionics of lower level

creatures_with_psionics.powers: Varying by individual; often Telepathy and Clairsentience devotions
Telekinesis, Teleport, Dimension Walk, Astral Projection
Similar to Githyanki; more defensive focus
Immune to non-psionic attack; eats PSPs from others
All Telepathy powers; hive mind of mind flayer colony
